author: doll-agent
content: Added kneighbors() to FittedKNeighborsClassifier and FittedKNeighborsRegressor; added radius_neighbors() to FittedRadiusNeighborsClassifier and FittedRadiusNeighborsRegressor. Both share new pub(crate) helpers (kneighbors_impl in knn.rs, radius_neighbors_impl in radius_neighbors.rs) that validate feature counts and delegate to the existing find_neighbors / find_radius_neighbors infrastructure. Promoted the crate-private SpatialIndex enums to pub(crate) so the helpers compose. Also added n_samples_fit() accessors to all four supervised estimators. Returns (Array2<F>, Array2<usize>) for kneighbors and a jagged RadiusNeighborsResult<F> = (Vec<Vec<F>>, Vec<Vec<usize>>) type alias for radius_neighbors. Validated by api_proof tests.
